tools.name: customers.androiddeviceprovisioningCustomersConfigurationsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new configuration. Once created, a customer can apply the configuration to devices.

tools.name: customers.androiddeviceprovisioningCustomersConfigurationsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an unused configuration. The API call fails if the customer has devices with the configuration applied.

tools.name: customers.androiddeviceprovisioningCustomersConfigurationsList
tools.description: Lists a customer's configurations.

tools.name: customers.androiddeviceprovisioningCustomersConfigurationsPatch
tools.description: Updates a configuration's field values.

tools.name: customers.androiddeviceprovisioningCustomersDevicesApplyConfiguration
tools.description: Applies a Configuration to the device to register the device for zero-touch enrollment. After applying a configuration to a device, the device automatically provisions itself on first boot, or next factory reset.

tools.name: customers.androiddeviceprovisioningCustomersDevicesList
tools.description: Lists a customer's devices.

tools.name: customers.androiddeviceprovisioningCustomersDevicesRemoveConfiguration
tools.description: Removes a configuration from device.

tools.name: customers.androiddeviceprovisioningCustomersDevicesUnclaim
tools.description: Unclaims a device from a customer and removes it from zero-touch enrollment. After removing a device, a customer must contact their reseller to register the device into zero-touch enrollment again.

tools.name: customers.androiddeviceprovisioningCustomersDpcsList
tools.description: Lists the DPCs (device policy controllers) that support zero-touch enrollment.

tools.name: customers.androiddeviceprovisioningCustomersList
tools.description: Lists the user's customer accounts.

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersCustomersCreate
tools.description: Creates a customer for zero-touch enrollment. After the method returns successfully, admin and owner roles can manage devices and EMM configs by calling API methods or using their zero-touch enrollment portal. The customer receives an email that welcomes them to zero-touch enrollment and explains how to sign into the portal.

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersCustomersList
tools.description: Lists the customers that are enrolled to the reseller identified by the `partnerId` argument. This list includes customers that the reseller created and customers that enrolled themselves using the portal.

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersDevicesClaim
tools.description: Claims a device for a customer and adds it to zero-touch enrollment. If the device is already claimed by another customer, the call returns an error.

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersDevicesClaimAsync
tools.description: Claims a batch of devices for a customer asynchronously. Adds the devices to zero-touch enrollment. To learn more, read [Long‑running batch operations](/zero-touch/guides/how-it-works#operations).

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersDevicesFindByIdentifier
tools.description: Finds devices by hardware identifiers, such as IMEI.

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersDevicesFindByOwner
tools.description: Finds devices claimed for customers. The results only contain devices registered to the reseller that's identified by the `partnerId` argument. The customer's devices purchased from other resellers don't appear in the results.

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersDevicesGet
tools.description: Gets a device.

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersDevicesMetadata
tools.description: Updates reseller metadata associated with the device. Android devices only.

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersDevicesUnclaim
tools.description: Unclaims a device from a customer and removes it from zero-touch enrollment.

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersDevicesUnclaimAsync
tools.description: Unclaims a batch of devices for a customer asynchronously. Removes the devices from zero-touch enrollment. To learn more, read [Long‑running batch operations](/zero-touch/guides/how-it-works#operations).

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersDevicesUpdateMetadataAsync
tools.description: Updates the reseller metadata attached to a batch of devices. This method updates devices asynchronously and returns an `Operation` that can be used to track progress. Read [Long‑running batch operations](/zero-touch/guides/how-it-works#operations). Android Devices only.

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersVendorsCustomersList
tools.description: Lists the customers of the vendor.

tools.name: partners.androiddeviceprovisioningPartnersVendorsList
tools.description: Lists the vendors of the partner.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
